text:
Created attachment 181202
Ports-Diff

Hi,

We have couple ports that depends of devel/bglibs I want to update it, however I need to update all other ports from the same author as well as that depends of bglibs.

Here is a patch that updates this port to version 1.0 that is using the new lib bglibs.


Thanks.
